name: grenagent-agent-sidecar
description: GrenAgent's pi-based agent sidecar (RPC mode) with 8 built-in extensions, spawned by the Tauri backend.

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cjsCreateRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = __cjsCreateRequire(import.meta.url);" --external:@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external:@ast-grep/napi --outfile=dist/main.js
